description:
You are the QA Manager for TailwindTraders. Organize the 'TailwindTraders' project backlog by tagging work items related to cross-cutting concerns and creating shared queries to track them. Apply the tag 'security' to items related to authentication, vulnerabilities, or rate limiting; 'performance' to items related to speed, indexing, or resource exhaustion; and 'api' to items related to endpoints, REST, or backend services. Items purely about UI/frontend should not be tagged. Under 'Shared Queries', create a folder named 'Cross-Cutting Concerns' containing three queries: 'Security Items', 'Performance Items', and 'API Items', which return all items with their respective tags.

Login credentials:
Username: Docker
Password: GymAnything123!
